creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
Kubilay Kocak <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>:

>  Marcus, is this still an issue since the recent
>  "great-python-refactor-of-2013" that has the lang/pythonXX ports
>  installing version-suffixed versions of files?

No, it should not be an issue anymore (lang/python might get in the way
now, but this is being worked on).

Cheers
Marcus
